title: dalea lasiathera
intro: Dalea lasiathera, also known as the Silver Prickly Pear or Silver Dalea, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Dalea lasiathera include its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Dalea lasiathera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbal practitioners also using it in salves and creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
